title: Team Work
description: Work performed by the team, assessed by the boss agent from Slack activity.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT count(*) AS items FROM assessments WHERE performer_kind IN (${kind:sqlstring}) AND CAST(strftime('%s', ts) AS INTEGER) BETWEEN ${__from:date:seconds} AND ${__to:date:seconds}
targets.queryText: SELECT count(*) AS items FROM assessments WHERE performer_kind IN (${kind:sqlstring}) AND CAST(strftime('%s', ts) AS INTEGER) BETWEEN ${__from:date:seconds} AND ${__to:date:seconds}

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT 100.0 * sum(status='ok') / nullif(sum(status IN ('ok','failed')), 0) AS sla FROM assessments WHERE performer_kind IN (${kind:sqlstring}) AND CAST(strftime('%s', ts) AS INTEGER) BETWEEN ${__from:date:seconds} AND ${__to:date:seconds}
targets.queryText: SELECT 100.0 * sum(status='ok') / nullif(sum(status IN ('ok','failed')), 0) AS sla FROM assessments WHERE performer_kind IN (${kind:sqlstring}) AND CAST(strftime('%s', ts) AS INTEGER) BETWEEN ${__from:date:seconds} AND ${__to:date:seconds}

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT coalesce(sum(human_minutes_saved),0)/60.0 AS hours FROM assessments WHERE performer_kind='agent' AND CAST(strftime('%s', ts) AS INTEGER) BETWEEN ${__from:date:seconds} AND ${__to:date:seconds}
targets.queryText: SELECT coalesce(sum(human_minutes_saved),0)/60.0 AS hours FROM assessments WHERE performer_kind='agent' AND CAST(strftime('%s', ts) AS INTEGER) BETWEEN ${__from:date:seconds} AND ${__to:date:seconds}

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT sum(status='attention') AS n FROM assessments WHERE performer_kind IN (${kind:sqlstring}) AND CAST(strftime('%s', ts) AS INTEGER) BETWEEN ${__from:date:seconds} AND ${__to:date:seconds}
targets.queryText: SELECT sum(status='attention') AS n FROM assessments WHERE performer_kind IN (${kind:sqlstring}) AND CAST(strftime('%s', ts) AS INTEGER) BETWEEN ${__from:date:seconds} AND ${__to:date:seconds}

panels.title: Work items over time, by outcome

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT cast(strftime('%s', date(ts)) AS int) * 1000 AS time, outcome, count(*) AS items FROM assessments WHERE performer_kind IN (${kind:sqlstring}) AND CAST(strftime('%s', ts) AS INTEGER) BETWEEN ${__from:date:seconds} AND ${__to:date:seconds} GROUP BY date(ts), outcome ORDER BY time
targets.queryText: SELECT cast(strftime('%s', date(ts)) AS int) * 1000 AS time, outcome, count(*) AS items FROM assessments WHERE performer_kind IN (${kind:sqlstring}) AND CAST(strftime('%s', ts) AS INTEGER) BETWEEN ${__from:date:seconds} AND ${__to:date:seconds} GROUP BY date(ts), outcome ORDER BY time

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT outcome, count(*) AS items FROM assessments WHERE performer_kind IN (${kind:sqlstring}) AND CAST(strftime('%s', ts) AS INTEGER) BETWEEN ${__from:date:seconds} AND ${__to:date:seconds} GROUP BY outcome ORDER BY items DESC
targets.queryText: SELECT outcome, count(*) AS items FROM assessments WHERE performer_kind IN (${kind:sqlstring}) AND CAST(strftime('%s', ts) AS INTEGER) BETWEEN ${__from:date:seconds} AND ${__to:date:seconds} GROUP BY outcome ORDER BY items DESC

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT performer_name AS performer, performer_kind AS kind, count(*) AS items, sum(status='attention') AS attention, sum(status='failed') AS failed, round(100.0*sum(status='ok')/nullif(sum(status IN ('ok','failed')),0),0) AS 'SLA %', coalesce(sum(human_minutes_saved),0) AS 'minutes saved', max(ts) AS 'last seen' FROM assessments WHERE performer_kind IN (${kind:sqlstring}) AND CAST(strftime('%s', ts) AS INTEGER) BETWEEN ${__from:date:seconds} AND ${__to:date:seconds} GROUP BY performer_id ORDER BY items DESC
targets.queryText: SELECT performer_name AS performer, performer_kind AS kind, count(*) AS items, sum(status='attention') AS attention, sum(status='failed') AS failed, round(100.0*sum(status='ok')/nullif(sum(status IN ('ok','failed')),0),0) AS 'SLA %', coalesce(sum(human_minutes_saved),0) AS 'minutes saved', max(ts) AS 'last seen' FROM assessments WHERE performer_kind IN (${kind:sqlstring}) AND CAST(strftime('%s', ts) AS INTEGER) BETWEEN ${__from:date:seconds} AND ${__to:date:seconds} GROUP BY performer_id ORDER BY items DESC

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT coalesce(category,'(none)') AS category, count(*) AS items FROM assessments WHERE performer_kind IN (${kind:sqlstring}) AND CAST(strftime('%s', ts) AS INTEGER) BETWEEN ${__from:date:seconds} AND ${__to:date:seconds} GROUP BY category ORDER BY items DESC LIMIT 12
targets.queryText: SELECT coalesce(category,'(none)') AS category, count(*) AS items FROM assessments WHERE performer_kind IN (${kind:sqlstring}) AND CAST(strftime('%s', ts) AS INTEGER) BETWEEN ${__from:date:seconds} AND ${__to:date:seconds} GROUP BY category ORDER BY items DESC LIMIT 12

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT type, count(*) AS items FROM assessments WHERE performer_kind IN (${kind:sqlstring}) AND CAST(strftime('%s', ts) AS INTEGER) BETWEEN ${__from:date:seconds} AND ${__to:date:seconds} GROUP BY type ORDER BY items DESC
targets.queryText: SELECT type, count(*) AS items FROM assessments WHERE performer_kind IN (${kind:sqlstring}) AND CAST(strftime('%s', ts) AS INTEGER) BETWEEN ${__from:date:seconds} AND ${__to:date:seconds} GROUP BY type ORDER BY items DESC

panels.title: Humans vs agents (always both)
panels.description: Like-for-like: same rubric, same channel evidence. avg time-to-outcome and outcome mix per performer kind.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT performer_kind AS kind, count(*) AS items, sum(status='ok') AS ok, sum(status='attention') AS attention, sum(status='failed') AS failed, round(avg(duration_ms)/60000.0,0) AS 'avg min' FROM assessments WHERE CAST(strftime('%s', ts) AS INTEGER) BETWEEN ${__from:date:seconds} AND ${__to:date:seconds} GROUP BY performer_kind ORDER BY items DESC
targets.queryText: SELECT performer_kind AS kind, count(*) AS items, sum(status='ok') AS ok, sum(status='attention') AS attention, sum(status='failed') AS failed, round(avg(duration_ms)/60000.0,0) AS 'avg min' FROM assessments WHERE CAST(strftime('%s', ts) AS INTEGER) BETWEEN ${__from:date:seconds} AND ${__to:date:seconds} GROUP BY performer_kind ORDER BY items DESC

panels.title: Work chains (multi-stage)
panels.description: One work item (same id) that moved through more than one stage.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT id AS 'work id', group_concat(type || ':' || outcome, ' -> ') AS stages, count(*) AS records, max(ts) AS 'last seen' FROM (SELECT * FROM assessments WHERE performer_kind IN (${kind:sqlstring}) AND CAST(strftime('%s', ts) AS INTEGER) BETWEEN ${__from:date:seconds} AND ${__to:date:seconds} ORDER BY ts) GROUP BY id HAVING count(DISTINCT type) > 1 ORDER BY max(ts) DESC
targets.queryText: SELECT id AS 'work id', group_concat(type || ':' || outcome, ' -> ') AS stages, count(*) AS records, max(ts) AS 'last seen' FROM (SELECT * FROM assessments WHERE performer_kind IN (${kind:sqlstring}) AND CAST(strftime('%s', ts) AS INTEGER) BETWEEN ${__from:date:seconds} AND ${__to:date:seconds} ORDER BY ts) GROUP BY id HAVING count(DISTINCT type) > 1 ORDER BY max(ts) DESC

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT ts, performer_name AS performer, type, outcome, coalesce(severity,'') AS severity, coalesce(category,'') AS category, coalesce(summary,'') AS summary FROM assessments WHERE status IN ('attention','failed') AND performer_kind IN (${kind:sqlstring}) AND CAST(strftime('%s', ts) AS INTEGER) BETWEEN ${__from:date:seconds} AND ${__to:date:seconds} ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 25
targets.queryText: SELECT ts, performer_name AS performer, type, outcome, coalesce(severity,'') AS severity, coalesce(category,'') AS category, coalesce(summary,'') AS summary FROM assessments WHERE status IN ('attention','failed') AND performer_kind IN (${kind:sqlstring}) AND CAST(strftime('%s', ts) AS INTEGER) BETWEEN ${__from:date:seconds} AND ${__to:date:seconds} ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 25
